fault_hypothesis: The code at line 66 incorrectly removes the last element of the merged list if both input lists end with the same value. This special-case logic is flawed and violates the property that a merge must preserve all elements from the inputs.

constraints.intent: The total number of elements must be preserved after the faulty pop operation.
The branch that removes an element must not violate the element count invariant.

spec.expr: not (merged__1 and left and right and merged__1[-1] == left[-1] == right[-1])

constraints.intent: The condition to de-duplicate the final element is incorrect and should never be met.
The final returned list must contain all elements from both inputs.
